title: NeonSpawn
description: Enhance your PvP server with NeonSpawn - The Ultimate /spawn Plugin
body:
🚀 **NeonSpawn** is a lightweight, high-performance spawn management plugin designed for Minecraft servers of all sizes. Whether you’re running a survival, factions, minigames, or hub server, **NeonSpawn** gives you full control over spawn locations, teleportation, and player respawning.

**🔥 Why Choose NeonSpawn?**
1. Lightning-Fast Teleportation – Instant spawn teleport with zero lag.
2. Custom Spawn Points – Set, modify, and teleport players to designated spawn locations.
3. Simple & Efficient – No unnecessary features, just pure spawn control.
4. Multi-Version Compatibility – Supports Minecraft 1.8 to 1.21.4.
5. Permission-Based Access – Grant control to admins, mods, or players with custom permissions.
6. Configurable Messages – Fully **customizable** spawn messages & settings in config.yml.

**✨ Features**​
1. Permission-Based System – Control access to commands.
2. Multi-World Support – Works across all worlds on your server.
3. Configurable Settings – Adjust messages, teleport mechanics, and more.
4. Ultra Lightweight – **Optimized** for **maximum** **performance** with minimal impact.
5. Plug & Play – No complex setup, works instantly upon installation.

**📜 Commands & Permissions**​
- /spawn --> neonspawn.spawn
- /setspawn --> neonspawn.setspawn

**🔧 Installation Guide**​
- 1️⃣ Download the plugin and place it in your plugins/ folder.
- 2️⃣ Restart your server to enable the plugin.
- 3️⃣ Set the spawn using /setspawn and you're good to go! 🎉

**🌍 Compatibility**​
- 🛠️ Works with Spigot, Paper, and Purpur.
- ⚡ Supports Minecraft versions 1.8 - 1.21.4.
- 🏆 **Optimized** for high-performance and large servers.
